message:
✨ Add section coverage icons to installer cards + fix resume loading (#1537)

- Add install/uninstall/upgrade/troubleshooting icons to InstallerCard
  showing which sections have steps (colored) vs missing (dimmed).
  Hover tooltip shows step count.
- Fix installers/solutions fetch not resuming after navigating away mid-load.
  Moved installersFetched/solutionsFetched ref assignment from before
  fetching to after successful completion, so cancelled fetches retry.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@ * Shows category icon+gradient, maturity badge, difficulty, install methods, and import button. */ -import { ExternalLink, Download, Wrench } from 'lucide-react' +import { ExternalLink, Download, Wrench, Trash2, ArrowUpCircle, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react' import { cn } from '../../lib/cn' import { CNCF_CATEGORY_GRADIENTS, @@ -87,6 +87,22 @@ export function InstallerCard({ mission, onImport, onSelect }: InstallerCardProp ))} + {/* Section coverage icons */} +
+ + + + + + + + + + + + +
+ {/* Author + Actions */}
